mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_MESSAGES ( CHAT_ID, USER_ID, CHAT_CONTENT, SEND_TIME ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{chatContent}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CHAT_ID, USER_ID, CHAT_CONTENT, SEND_TIME FROM CHAT_MESSAGES ORDER BY SEND_TIME ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CHAT_ID, USER_ID, CHAT_CONTENT, SEND_TIME FROM CHAT_MESSAGES
WHERE CHAT_ID < #{lastChatId} ORDER BY CHAT_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CHAT_ID, USER_ID, CHAT_CONTENT, SEND_TIME FROM CHAT_MESSAGES WHERE 1=1
AND CHAT_ID < #{lastChatId} ORDER BY CHAT_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
